## Documentation Lockstep

- [ ] `Changelog.md` updated for meaningful changes, or not needed because:
- [ ] `Context.md` updated if assumptions, architecture, data policy, or constraints changed, or not needed because:
- [ ] `Progress.md` updated if status, validation, blockers, or next steps changed, or not needed because:
- [ ] `README.md` or challenge docs updated if user-facing workflow, setup, or demo paths changed, or not needed because:

## Source Data

- [ ] Raw challenge source data was not edited, renamed, moved, normalised, or redacted.
- [ ] Synthetic fixture data was preserved unless an explicit requirement said otherwise.

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant checks run:
- [ ] Known limitations or skipped checks documented:
